name: QA 1505
description:

pmcheck ... repeated calls into checkproc.sh functions

- based on Nathan's Redis PMDA plugin experience

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1505.out.bad)
4c4,5
< TMP.pmcheck active              
---
> TMP.pmcheck could be activated   state (pmcd) from chkcofig unknown
>                                      pmcd not running
7c8,9
< TMP.pmcheck could be activated   pmcd not running
---
> TMP.pmcheck could be activated   state (pmcd) from chkcofig unknown
>                                      pmcd not running
10c12,14
< TMP.pmcheck could be activated   sample pmda not running
---
> TMP.pmcheck could be activated   state (pmcd) from chkcofig unknown
>                                      pmcd not running
>                                      sample pmda not running
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
